name: Task Execution Engine
description: Launches, monitors, and manages the full execution lifecycle of AI tasks with proper state machine transitions: building Claude CLI commands, handling process I/O, managing pause/resume/cancel, auto-commit, subtask injection, and token limit retries. Ensures tasks transition from Queued to Stored (executing) status when actually running.
